title: Create or modify calibration procedures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Create or modify calibration procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Assess the suitability of available calibration procedures

pcs.text: Confirm that the authorised calibration procedure is not appropriate for intended use or requires modification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that the authorised calibration procedure is not appropriate for intended use or requires modification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that the authorised calibration procedure is not appropriate for intended use or requires modification.

pcs.text: Research suitable alternative established calibration procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research suitable alternative established calibration procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research suitable alternative established calibration procedures.

pcs.text: Establish whether an available procedure can be customised or if a new procedure is needed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish whether an available procedure can be customised or if a new procedure is needed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish whether an available procedure can be customised or if a new procedure is needed.

pcs.text: Obtain internal approval to develop or modify a calibration procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain internal approval to develop or modify a calibration procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain internal approval to develop or modify a calibration procedure.

pcs.text: Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the alternative or new procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the alternative or new procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that available resources meet all the requirements of the alternative or new procedure.

pcs.text: Gain authorisation for any deviation from requirements previously agreed with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gain authorisation for any deviation from requirements previously agreed with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gain authorisation for any deviation from requirements previously agreed with client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess the suitability of available calibration procedures

elements.title: Develop procedure

pcs.text: Identify and document all relevant calibration data to be collected, including parameters and ranges to be tested
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document all relevant calibration data to be collected, including parameters and ranges to be tested?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document all relevant calibration data to be collected, including parameters and ranges to be tested.

pcs.text: Describe all new instructions or modifications to methods to ensure repeatability of test
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe all new instructions or modifications to methods to ensure repeatability of test?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe all new instructions or modifications to methods to ensure repeatability of test.

pcs.text: Document all hazards and safety measures to be observed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document all hazards and safety measures to be observed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document all hazards and safety measures to be observed.

pcs.text: Specify data to be recorded and produce a results template
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify data to be recorded and produce a results template?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify data to be recorded and produce a results template.

pcs.text: List the requirements for calibration approval and rejection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can List the requirements for calibration approval and rejection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can List the requirements for calibration approval and rejection.

pcs.text: Confirm that all calibration requirements can be fulfilled by using the procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that all calibration requirements can be fulfilled by using the procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that all calibration requirements can be fulfilled by using the procedure.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop procedure

elements.title: Prepare equipment for testing

pcs.text: Use the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use the appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), safety equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and set up reference standards and associated equipment prior to testing.

pcs.text: Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify performance of reference standards and measuring equipment prior to use and adjust or calibrate as necessary.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise potential sources of measurement error.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare equipment for testing

elements.title: Trial modified or new calibration procedure

pcs.text: Perform individual steps and confirm they are adequately documented to ensure repeatability of measurement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform individual steps and confirm they are adequately documented to ensure repeatability of measurement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform individual steps and confirm they are adequately documented to ensure repeatability of measurement.

pcs.text: Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Critically analyse readings to confirm they are the result of a valid measurement and record data as required.

pcs.text: Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust device under test to bring readings within tolerance and record results.

pcs.text: Analyse the resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that may significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse the resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that may significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse the resulting test data to detect trends or inconsistencies that may significantly affect the accuracy or validity of test results.

elements.title: Confirm the modified or new procedure is fit for purpose

pcs.text: Compare results achieved with those from other calibration procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results achieved with those from other calibration procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results achieved with those from other calibration procedures.

pcs.text: Systematically analyse all measurement and environmental factors that may influence the result and take corrective action as required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Systematically analyse all measurement and environmental factors that may influence the result and take corrective action as required.

pcs.text: Arrange for internal peer checking of calibration procedure, data and results and incorporate feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for internal peer checking of calibration procedure, data and results and incorporate feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for internal peer checking of calibration procedure, data and results and incorporate feedback.

pcs.text: Quantify the uncertainties of results obtained by analysing equipment specifications and test methodology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify the uncertainties of results obtained by analysing equipment specifications and test methodology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify the uncertainties of results obtained by analysing equipment specifications and test methodology.

pcs.text: Confirm that the modified or new procedure is fit for purpose and relevant to the client's needs and document as necessary

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that the modified or new procedure is fit for purpose and relevant to the client's needs and document as necessary.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and present the procedure to appropriate personnel for validation before use.
